name: Medusa
description: Jellyfish pulsing through the abyss, tentacles trailing — every redraw catches the bloom at a new depth and drift.

code.style: --drift: @rand(-10deg, 10deg); --rule: ( /* bell and tentacles share one emitted glow and altitude */ --glow2: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --jy: @r(10, 34); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 28%; width: 44%; top: calc(@var(--jy) * 1%); height: 30%; border-radius: 50% 50% 12% 12% / 88% 88% 12% 12%; background: @var(--glow2); opacity: 0.85; box-shadow: 0 0 calc(170px / @Y) @var(--glow2); transform: rotate(var(--drift)); transition: ease 800ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 35%; width: calc(22px / @Y); top: calc(@var(--jy) * 1% + 29%); height: @rand(20%, 34%); border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--glow2); opacity: 0.55; box-shadow: calc(130px / @Y) calc(-20px / @Y) @var(--glow2), calc(260px / @Y) calc(6px / @Y) @var(--glow2); transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
